pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/autoscaling/v2beta1, type HorizontalPodAutoscalerExpansion interface{}
pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/autoscaling/v2beta1, type HorizontalPodAutoscalerInterface interface{Apply(ctx context.Context, horizontalPodAutoscaler *k8s.io/client-go/applyconfigurations/autoscaling/v2beta1.HorizontalPodAutoscalerApplyConfiguration, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ApplyOptions) (result *k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta1.HorizontalPodAutoscaler, err error); ApplyStatus(ctx context.Context, horizontalPodAutoscaler *k8s.io/client-go/applyconfigurations/autoscaling/v2beta1.HorizontalPodAutoscalerApplyConfiguration, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ApplyOptions) (result *k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta1.HorizontalPodAutoscaler, err error); Create(ctx context.Context, horizontalPodAutoscaler *k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta1.HorizontalPodAutoscaler, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.CreateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta1.HorizontalPodAutoscaler, error); Delete(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions) error; DeleteCollection(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions, listOpts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) error; Get(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.GetOptions) (*k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta1.HorizontalPodAutoscaler, error); List(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (*k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta1.HorizontalPodAutoscalerList, error); Patch(ctx context.Context, name string, pt k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types.PatchType, data []byte, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.PatchOptions, subresources ...string) (result *k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta1.HorizontalPodAutoscaler, err error); Update(ctx context.Context, horizontalPodAutoscaler *k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta1.HorizontalPodAutoscaler, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.UpdateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta1.HorizontalPodAutoscaler, error); UpdateStatus(ctx context.Context, horizontalPodAutoscaler *k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta1.HorizontalPodAutoscaler, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.UpdateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta1.HorizontalPodAutoscaler, error); Watch(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/watch.Interface, error); HorizontalPodAutoscalerExpansion}

pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/autoscaling/v2beta2, method (AutoscalingV2beta2Client) RESTClient() k8s.io/client-go/rest.Interface
pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/autoscaling/v2beta2, type AutoscalingV2beta2Client struct{restClient k8s.io/client-go/rest.Interface}
pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/autoscaling/v2beta2, type AutoscalingV2beta2Interface interface{RESTClient() k8s.io/client-go/rest.Interface; HorizontalPodAutoscalersGetter}
pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/autoscaling/v2beta2, type HorizontalPodAutoscalerExpansion interface{}
pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/autoscaling/v2beta2, type HorizontalPodAutoscalerInterface interface{Apply(ctx context.Context, horizontalPodAutoscaler *k8s.io/client-go/applyconfigurations/autoscaling/v2beta2.HorizontalPodAutoscalerApplyConfiguration, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ApplyOptions) (result *k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta2.HorizontalPodAutoscaler, err error); ApplyStatus(ctx context.Context, horizontalPodAutoscaler *k8s.io/client-go/applyconfigurations/autoscaling/v2beta2.HorizontalPodAutoscalerApplyConfiguration, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ApplyOptions) (result *k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta2.HorizontalPodAutoscaler, err error); Create(ctx context.Context, horizontalPodAutoscaler *k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta2.HorizontalPodAutoscaler, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.CreateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta2.HorizontalPodAutoscaler, error); Delete(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions) error; DeleteCollection(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions, listOpts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) error; Get(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.GetOptions) (*k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta2.HorizontalPodAutoscaler, error); List(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (*k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta2.HorizontalPodAutoscalerList, error); Patch(ctx context.Context, name string, pt k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types.PatchType, data []byte, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.PatchOptions, subresources ...string) (result *k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta2.HorizontalPodAutoscaler, err error); Update(ctx context.Context, horizontalPodAutoscaler *k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta2.HorizontalPodAutoscaler, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.UpdateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta2.HorizontalPodAutoscaler, error); UpdateStatus(ctx context.Context, horizontalPodAutoscaler *k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta2.HorizontalPodAutoscaler, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.UpdateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta2.HorizontalPodAutoscaler, error); Watch(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/watch.Interface, error); HorizontalPodAutoscalerExpansion}
pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/autoscaling/v2beta2, type HorizontalPodAutoscalersGetter interface{HorizontalPodAutoscalers(namespace string) HorizontalPodAutoscalerInterface}

pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/certificates/v1alpha1, type PodCertificateRequestExpansion interface{}
pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/certificates/v1alpha1, type PodCertificateRequestInterface interface{Apply(ctx context.Context, podCertificateRequest *k8s.io/client-go/applyconfigurations/certificates/v1alpha1.PodCertificateRequestApplyConfiguration, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ApplyOptions) (result *k8s.io/api/certificates/v1alpha1.PodCertificateRequest, err error); ApplyStatus(ctx context.Context, podCertificateRequest *k8s.io/client-go/applyconfigurations/certificates/v1alpha1.PodCertificateRequestApplyConfiguration, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ApplyOptions) (result *k8s.io/api/certificates/v1alpha1.PodCertificateRequest, err error); Create(ctx context.Context, podCertificateRequest *k8s.io/api/certificates/v1alpha1.PodCertificateRequest, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.CreateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/certificates/v1alpha1.PodCertificateRequest, error); Delete(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions) error; DeleteCollection(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions, listOpts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) error; Get(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.GetOptions) (*k8s.io/api/certificates/v1alpha1.PodCertificateRequest, error); List(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (*k8s.io/api/certificates/v1alpha1.PodCertificateRequestList, error); Patch(ctx context.Context, name string, pt k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types.PatchType, data []byte, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.PatchOptions, subresources ...string) (result *k8s.io/api/certificates/v1alpha1.PodCertificateRequest, err error); Update(ctx context.Context, podCertificateRequest *k8s.io/api/certificates/v1alpha1.PodCertificateRequest, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.UpdateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/certificates/v1alpha1.PodCertificateRequest, error); UpdateStatus(ctx context.Context, podCertificateRequest *k8s.io/api/certificates/v1alpha1.PodCertificateRequest, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.UpdateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/certificates/v1alpha1.PodCertificateRequest, error); Watch(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/watch.Interface, error); PodCertificateRequestExpansion}

pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/core/v1, type EventExpansion interface{CreateWithEventNamespace(event *k8s.io/api/core/v1.Event) (*k8s.io/api/core/v1.Event, error); GetFieldSelector(involvedObjectName *string, involvedObjectNamespace *string, involvedObjectKind *string, involvedObjectUID *string) k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/fields.Selector; PatchWithEventNamespace(event *k8s.io/api/core/v1.Event, data []byte) (*k8s.io/api/core/v1.Event, error); Search(scheme *k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime.Scheme, objOrRef k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime.Object) (*k8s.io/api/core/v1.EventList, error); UpdateWithEventNamespace(event *k8s.io/api/core/v1.Event) (*k8s.io/api/core/v1.Event, error)}
pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/core/v1, type PodInterface interface{Apply(ctx context.Context, pod *k8s.io/client-go/applyconfigurations/core/v1.PodApplyConfiguration, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ApplyOptions) (result *k8s.io/api/core/v1.Pod, err error); ApplyStatus(ctx context.Context, pod *k8s.io/client-go/applyconfigurations/core/v1.PodApplyConfiguration, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ApplyOptions) (result *k8s.io/api/core/v1.Pod, err error); Create(ctx context.Context, pod *k8s.io/api/core/v1.Pod, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.CreateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/core/v1.Pod, error); Delete(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions) error; DeleteCollection(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions, listOpts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) error; Get(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.GetOptions) (*k8s.io/api/core/v1.Pod, error); List(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (*k8s.io/api/core/v1.PodList, error); Patch(ctx context.Context, name string, pt k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types.PatchType, data []byte, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.PatchOptions, subresources ...string) (result *k8s.io/api/core/v1.Pod, err error); Update(ctx context.Context, pod *k8s.io/api/core/v1.Pod, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.UpdateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/core/v1.Pod, error); UpdateEphemeralContainers(ctx context.Context, podName string, pod *k8s.io/api/core/v1.Pod, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.UpdateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/core/v1.Pod, error); UpdateStatus(ctx context.Context, pod *k8s.io/api/core/v1.Pod, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.UpdateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/core/v1.Pod, error); Watch(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/watch.Interface, error); PodExpansion}

pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/networking/v1alpha1, type IPAddressExpansion interface{}
pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/networking/v1alpha1, type IPAddressInterface interface{Apply(ctx context.Context, iPAddress *k8s.io/client-go/applyconfigurations/networking/v1alpha1.IPAddressApplyConfiguration, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ApplyOptions) (result *k8s.io/api/networking/v1alpha1.IPAddress, err error); Create(ctx context.Context, iPAddress *k8s.io/api/networking/v1alpha1.IPAddress, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.CreateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/networking/v1alpha1.IPAddress, error); Delete(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions) error; DeleteCollection(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions, listOpts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) error; Get(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.GetOptions) (*k8s.io/api/networking/v1alpha1.IPAddress, error); List(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (*k8s.io/api/networking/v1alpha1.IPAddressList, error); Patch(ctx context.Context, name string, pt k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types.PatchType, data []byte, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.PatchOptions, subresources ...string) (result *k8s.io/api/networking/v1alpha1.IPAddress, err error); Update(ctx context.Context, iPAddress *k8s.io/api/networking/v1alpha1.IPAddress, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.UpdateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/networking/v1alpha1.IPAddress, error); Watch(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/watch.Interface, error); IPAddressExpansion}
pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/networking/v1alpha1, type IPAddressesGetter interface{IPAddresses() IPAddressInterface}
pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/networking/v1alpha1, type NetworkingV1alpha1Client struct{restClient k8s.io/client-go/rest.Interface}
pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/networking/v1alpha1, type NetworkingV1alpha1Interface interface{RESTClient() k8s.io/client-go/rest.Interface; IPAddressesGetter; ServiceCIDRsGetter}
pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/networking/v1alpha1, type ServiceCIDRExpansion interface{}
pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/networking/v1alpha1, type ServiceCIDRInterface interface{Apply(ctx context.Context, serviceCIDR *k8s.io/client-go/applyconfigurations/networking/v1alpha1.ServiceCIDRApplyConfiguration, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ApplyOptions) (result *k8s.io/api/networking/v1alpha1.ServiceCIDR, err error); ApplyStatus(ctx context.Context, serviceCIDR *k8s.io/client-go/applyconfigurations/networking/v1alpha1.ServiceCIDRApplyConfiguration, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ApplyOptions) (result *k8s.io/api/networking/v1alpha1.ServiceCIDR, err error); Create(ctx context.Context, serviceCIDR *k8s.io/api/networking/v1alpha1.ServiceCIDR, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.CreateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/networking/v1alpha1.ServiceCIDR, error); Delete(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions) error; DeleteCollection(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions, listOpts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) error; Get(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.GetOptions) (*k8s.io/api/networking/v1alpha1.ServiceCIDR, error); List(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (*k8s.io/api/networking/v1alpha1.ServiceCIDRList, error); Patch(ctx context.Context, name string, pt k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types.PatchType, data []byte, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.PatchOptions, subresources ...string) (result *k8s.io/api/networking/v1alpha1.ServiceCIDR, err error); Update(ctx context.Context, serviceCIDR *k8s.io/api/networking/v1alpha1.ServiceCIDR, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.UpdateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/networking/v1alpha1.ServiceCIDR, error); UpdateStatus(ctx context.Context, serviceCIDR *k8s.io/api/networking/v1alpha1.ServiceCIDR, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.UpdateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/networking/v1alpha1.ServiceCIDR, error); Watch(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/watch.Interface, error); ServiceCIDRExpansion}

pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/resource/v1alpha2, func New(c k8s.io/client-go/rest.Interface) *ResourceV1alpha2Client
pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/resource/v1alpha2, func NewForConfig(c *k8s.io/client-go/rest.Config) (*ResourceV1alpha2Client, error)
pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/resource/v1alpha2, func NewForConfigAndClient(c *k8s.io/client-go/rest.Config, h *net/http.Client) (*ResourceV1alpha2Client, error)

pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/resource/v1alpha2, method (ResourceV1alpha2Client) ResourceSlices() ResourceSliceInterface
pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/resource/v1alpha2, type PodSchedulingContextExpansion interface{}
pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/resource/v1alpha2, type PodSchedulingContextInterface interface{Apply(ctx context.Context, podSchedulingContext *k8s.io/client-go/applyconfigurations/resource/v1alpha2.PodSchedulingContextApplyConfiguration, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ApplyOptions) (result *k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha2.PodSchedulingContext, err error); ApplyStatus(ctx context.Context, podSchedulingContext *k8s.io/client-go/applyconfigurations/resource/v1alpha2.PodSchedulingContextApplyConfiguration, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ApplyOptions) (result *k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha2.PodSchedulingContext, err error); Create(ctx context.Context, podSchedulingContext *k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha2.PodSchedulingContext, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.CreateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha2.PodSchedulingContext, error); Delete(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions) error; DeleteCollection(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions, listOpts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) error; Get(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.GetOptions) (*k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha2.PodSchedulingContext, error); List(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (*k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha2.PodSchedulingContextList, error); Patch(ctx context.Context, name string, pt k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types.PatchType, data []byte, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.PatchOptions, subresources ...string) (result *k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha2.PodSchedulingContext, err error); Update(ctx context.Context, podSchedulingContext *k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha2.PodSchedulingContext, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.UpdateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha2.PodSchedulingContext, error); UpdateStatus(ctx context.Context, podSchedulingContext *k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha2.PodSchedulingContext, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.UpdateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha2.PodSchedulingContext, error); pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/resource/v1alpha3, type DeviceClassInterface interface{Apply(ctx context.Context, deviceClass *k8s.io/client-go/applyconfigurations/resource/v1alpha3.DeviceClassApplyConfiguration, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ApplyOptions) (result *k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.DeviceClass, err error); Create(ctx context.Context, deviceClass *k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.DeviceClass, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.CreateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.DeviceClass, error); Delete(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions) error; DeleteCollection(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions, listOpts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) error; Get(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.GetOptions) (*k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.DeviceClass, error); List(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (*k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.DeviceClassList, error); Patch(ctx context.Context, name string, pt k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types.PatchType, data []byte, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.PatchOptions, subresources ...string) (result *k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.DeviceClass, err error); Update(ctx context.Context, deviceClass *k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.DeviceClass, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.UpdateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.DeviceClass, error); Watch(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/watch.Interface, error); DeviceClassExpansion}

Delete(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions) error; DeleteCollection(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions, listOpts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) error; Get(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.GetOptions) (*k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.PodSchedulingContext, error); List(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (*k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.PodSchedulingContextList, error); Patch(ctx context.Context, name string, pt k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types.PatchType, data []byte, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.PatchOptions, subresources ...string) (result *k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.PodSchedulingContext, err error); Update(ctx context.Context, podSchedulingContext *k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.PodSchedulingContext, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.UpdateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.PodSchedulingContext, error); Watch(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/watch.Interface, error); PodSchedulingContextExpansion}

Watch(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/watch.Interface, error); ResourceClaimExpansion}
pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/resource/v1alpha3, type ResourceClaimTemplateExpansion interface{}
pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/resource/v1alpha3, type ResourceClaimTemplateInterface interface{Apply(ctx context.Context, resourceClaimTemplate *k8s.io/client-go/applyconfigurations/resource/v1alpha3.ResourceClaimTemplateApplyConfiguration, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ApplyOptions) (result *k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.ResourceClaimTemplate, err error); Create(ctx context.Context, resourceClaimTemplate *k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.ResourceClaimTemplate, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.CreateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.ResourceClaimTemplate, error); Delete(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions) error; DeleteCollection(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions, listOpts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) error; Get(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.GetOptions) (*k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.ResourceClaimTemplate, error); List(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (*k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.ResourceClaimTemplateList, error); Patch(ctx context.Context, name string, pt k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types.PatchType, data []byte, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.PatchOptions, subresources ...string) (result *k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.ResourceClaimTemplate, err error); Update(ctx context.Context, resourceClaimTemplate *k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.ResourceClaimTemplate, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.UpdateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.ResourceClaimTemplate, error); Watch(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/watch.Interface, error); ResourceClaimTemplateExpansion}

pkg k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/resource/v1alpha3, type ResourceSliceInterface interface{Apply(ctx context.Context, resourceSlice *k8s.io/client-go/applyconfigurations/resource/v1alpha3.ResourceSliceApplyConfiguration, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ApplyOptions) (result *k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.ResourceSlice, err error); Create(ctx context.Context, resourceSlice *k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.ResourceSlice, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.CreateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.ResourceSlice, error); Delete(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions) error; DeleteCollection(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions, listOpts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) error; Get(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.GetOptions) (*k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.ResourceSlice, error); List(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (*k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.ResourceSliceList, error); Patch(ctx context.Context, name string, pt k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types.PatchType, data []byte, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.PatchOptions, subresources ...string) (result *k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.ResourceSlice, err error); Update(ctx context.Context, resourceSlice *k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.ResourceSlice, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.UpdateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/resource/v1alpha3.ResourceSlice, error); Watch(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/watch.Interface, error); ResourceSliceExpansion}
